Name: Dalal
Description: Top notes: Apple and Mandarin. Middle notes: Jasmine, Ylang-Ylang and Orange. Base notes: Vanilla, Musk and Oakmoss. Dalal by Lattafa is a comforting gourmand-floral fragrance that blends fruity sweetness with creamy warmth and delicate florals. It opens with a juicy, inviting mix of apple and mandarin, delivering a bright yet smooth freshness that feels instantly uplifting and familiar. This luminous introduction creates a gentle sweetness that draws you in without overpowering the senses. At the heart, jasmine, ylang-ylang, and orange blossom unfold into a soft floral bouquet—elegant, slightly creamy, and subtly exotic. The fragrance settles into a warm base of vanilla, musk, and oakmoss, leaving a smooth, lightly powdery trail with a touch of mossy depth. Dalal leans feminine, cozy, and effortlessly charming—a perfect everyday scent for those who love sweet fragrances that feel comforting, graceful, and timeless.

Name: Fakhar Rose Body Mist
Description: Fakhar Rose Body Mist by Lattafa is a feminine fragrance from the fruity floral family. Immerse yourself in the sophistication of Fakhar Rose Body Mist by Lattafa, a fragrance that celebrates beauty and femininity with a rich and enveloping olfactory bouquet. The top notes of fruits, lily, pomegranate and aldehydes offer a fresh and fruity opening, enriched with a touch of elegance and luminosity. At the heart of the perfume, a sumptuous combination of tuberose, jasmine, gardenia, ylang-ylang, honeysuckle, peony and rose creates an opulent floral bouquet, enveloping the senses with its complexity and beauty. The base notes leave a lasting and sensual imprint, with the warm sweetness of vanilla, the modernity of ambroxan, the softness of white musk and the depth of sandalwood. Fakhar Rose Body Mist by Lattafa is more than just a perfume; it is an olfactory experience that evokes elegance, sophistication and a timeless charm. Discover its unique aroma and let yourself be carried away by its aura of luxury and style. Perfect for the woman who seeks a distinctive and unforgettable fragrance. Description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of Angham Body Mist, a perfume that expresses grace and seduction. The fragrance opens with a lively explosion of ginger, pink pepper and mandarin, creating a fresh and sparkling opening that captures the attention. In the heart, a delicate fusion of lavender, praline, cocoa and jasmine envelops the senses in an irresistible sweetness, giving depth and complexity to the perfume. The base notes of vanilla, amber and musk blend to create a warm and sensual base, which leaves a lasting and enveloping imprint. Angham Body Mist by Lattafa is not just a perfume; it is an olfactory experience that celebrates femininity with its unique mix of freshness and sweetness. Perfect for the modern woman who wants to express her individuality with a distinctive and fascinating fragrance. Discover its aroma and let yourself be conquered by its timeless elegance. Name: Yara Perfume Mist
Description: Yara Body Mist by Lattafa is a feminine fragrance from the floral gourmand family. Yara Body Mist by Lattafa is an irresistible perfume that embodies elegance and seduction. This feminine fragrance opens with enveloping top notes, thanks to heliotrope, orchid and tangerine, creating an explosion of freshness and refinement. The heart notes reveal a gourmand accord combined with tropical fruits, offering a creamy and inviting sweetness. This sweet and fruity heart adds an exotic and modern dimension to the perfume, perfect for those who love rich and delicious fragrances. In the base, Yara evolves with warm and sensual notes of vanilla, musk and sandalwood, ensuring a persistent and sophisticated trail. The combination of these elements makes the fragrance ideal for women who want an unforgettable and enveloping olfactory presence. Yara Body Mist by Lattafa is an excellent choice for those looking for a perfume that combines gourmand sweetness with a touch of exoticism and sensuality, perfect for any occasion. Name: Nuha Bon Bon
Description: Khadlaj Nuha Bon Bon Eau de Parfum Spray for Women is a delightful gourmand fragrance that captures the joy of sweet indulgence and playful femininity. The scent opens with a deliciously creamy blend of strawberry, milk, and peach, creating a soft, mouth-watering introduction that feels comforting yet irresistible. At the heart, a dreamy combination of orange blossom and ice cream adds a smooth, floral-sweet charm, enhancing the fragrance’s cheerful and youthful character. The scent settles into a warm and sensual base of vanilla absolute, leaving behind a long-lasting, cozy trail that feels both elegant and addictive. Perfect for everyday wear and special moments alike, Nuha Bon Bon by Khadlaj Perfumes is a sweet expression of happiness, femininity, and modern charm crafted for women who love playful, creamy, and comforting fragrances.

Its scent opens with a unique note that leaves a distinct impression from the first moment, then flows smoothly into a soft heart that reflects balance and inner beauty. Its final touch is warm, leaving a calm, lasting effect, like a subtle fingerprint expressing refined taste and a balanced presence. Name: Eclaire Banoffi
Description: Top notes: Banana and Dulce de leche. Middle notes: Whipped Cream and Vanilla. Base notes: Praline, Biscuit and Musk. Éclaire Banoffi by Lattafa is a sumptuous gourmand fragrance inspired by the world-famous English dessert, Banoffee Pie—a delectable blend of banana, cream, and caramel. It opens with a mouthwatering fusion of banana and dulce de leche, capturing the comforting sweetness of a golden caramel swirl and the warmth of ripe fruit. The result is creamy, velvety, and irresistibly indulgent, evoking the comforting pleasure of a dessert freshly served from the oven. As the fragrance unfolds, layers of whipped cream and vanilla melt into a heart of pure gourmand bliss. The base reveals a deliciously textured accord of praline, biscuit, and musk, balancing sweetness with sophistication. The musky undertone softens the sugary richness, lending elegance to the composition and ensuring lasting comfort on the skin. Éclaire Banoffi is more than a perfume—it’s an edible fantasy in a bottle, designed for lovers of creamy, sweet, and refined indulgence.

Name: Eclaire Pistache
Description: Top notes: Pistachio Spread Cream and Pistachio. Middle notes: Cacao, Whipped Cream and Coconut. Base notes: Milk, Vanilla and Musk. Éclaire Pistache by Lattafa is a lavish gourmand fragrance inspired by the art of fine pastry. From the first moment, it unveils an irresistible duet of pistachio spread cream and roasted pistachio, capturing the warmth of a golden confection just out of the oven. The opening feels nutty, smooth, and indulgent—like a spoonful of sweet pistachio cream melting over soft sponge cake. At the heart, rich layers of cacao, whipped cream, and coconut create a creamy, velvety texture that balances warmth with sophistication. As the fragrance deepens, milk, vanilla, and musk blend into a luscious base, offering a soft and comforting finish that lingers beautifully on the skin. Both toasted and creamy, Éclaire Pistache transforms the essence of pistachio into an elegant, modern signature. Addictive, creamy, and refined, it’s a true olfactory dessert for those who love their sweetness wrapped in luxury.

Name: Asad Elixir
Description: Top notes: Grapefruit, Pink Pepper and Saffron. Middle notes: Tobacco, Cedar and Vanilla. Base notes: Light Amber, Patchouli, Frankincense and Cashmeran. Asad Elixir by Lattafa is a bold and intoxicating reinterpretation of the iconic Asad, deepened with greater power, richness, and sensuality. It opens with an electrifying blend of grapefruit, pink pepper, and saffron, igniting the senses with spice and heat. This sharp, daring opening embodies raw confidence and magnetic intensity—an invitation into the darker side of elegance. At the heart, tobacco, cedarwood, and vanilla create a smoky, creamy contrast—refined yet dangerously seductive. The base reveals an intricate fusion of amber, patchouli, frankincense, and cashmeran, adding depth, warmth, and mystery. Asad Elixir is strength in liquid form: smooth, smoldering, and utterly addictive. A statement fragrance for those who don’t follow the rules—they write them.

Name: Yara Elixir
Description: Top notes: Strawberry S’mores and Black Currant. Middle notes: Jasmine and Orange Blossom. Base notes: Caramel, Vanilla, Amber and Musk. Yara Elixir by Lattafa is a sensual oriental-gourmand fragrance that celebrates modern femininity with irresistible sweetness and magnetic charm. It opens with an indulgent fusion of strawberry s’mores and black currant, blending creamy chocolate warmth with juicy red fruits for a playful yet sophisticated start. The heart blooms with jasmine and orange blossom, adding radiant floral elegance and a luminous, feminine allure. As the scent deepens, caramel, vanilla, amber, and musk create a rich, velvety base that wraps the skin in golden warmth. The result is both sweet and seductive—an enchanting trail that lingers long after you leave the room. Yara Elixir embodies confidence, allure, and indulgence in perfect balance—a fragrance made for the woman who knows her power and wears it with grace.

Name: Nasmaat

Description: Top Notes: Blackcurrant, Pineapple, Apricot Heart Notes: Magnolia, Orange Blossom, Rose, Cyclamen, Jasmine Base Notes: Caramel, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Cashmeran Lattafa Nasmaat is a fragrance that beautifully balances vibrance, elegance, and warmth. It opens with a playful burst of blackcurrant, pineapple, and apricot, delivering a fruity brightness. The heart reveals a lush floral blend of magnolia, orange blossom, rose, cyclamen, and jasmine, evoking the charm of a blooming garden in full flourish. As the scent deepens, caramel, vanilla, sandalwood, and cashmeran create a creamy, velvety base that lingers softly, wrapping you in comfort and refinement.

Name: Alive Now
Description: Alive Now by Maison Alhambra is a captivating fruity-floral fragrance for women that unfolds with a delightful blend of freshness and sweetness. The top notes feature juicy lychee, bright raspberry, and a hint of green violet leaf, creating a lively and playful opening that captures attention and promises sensory richness. As the fragrance develops, an elegant floral bouquet emerges at the heart. Peony introduces a touch of floral femininity, rose adds a romantic note, and jasmine infuses subtle sensuality. These heart notes combine to create a harmonious floral symphony, evoking a sense of freshness and grace. The base notes provide depth and lasting allure. Sweet vanilla wraps the fragrance in warmth, while musk adds an earthy, slightly animalic touch, lending a sensual and mysterious finish. Alive Now concludes with an elegant, enduring presence that leaves a memorable impression.
